bug_data.summary: Update the Yelp suggestions row UI

attachments.summary: Bug 2010185: Standardize row UI for Yelp suggestion
attachments.creator: daisuke@birchill.co.jp
attachments.description: Bug 2010185: Standardize row UI for Yelp suggestion

bug_data.description:
Update the Yelp suggestions row UI. See [the Figma spec](https://www.figma.com/design/HlHYKdDVCszbbpjuovBDjg/Carrots---S-S-Online-Explorations?node-id=6584-5018&t=Xg06pmlLPj9lmpCj-0):

* Change the title to "[query] · Yelp"
* Show "Sponsored" as the bottom text
* Remove the "Feedback" label from the result menu button
* The lower-placement icon size should *not* change now since that will be done later as part of Nova
* Show URL at the bottom on hover/selection? Check with Paul et al. first since Yelp suggestions currently do not show URL
bug_data.creator: adw@mozilla.com

bug_analysis.root_cause: The Yelp suggestions row UI was outdated and inconsistent with the new design spec, requiring updates to title formatting, text labels, icon sizing, and hover behavior.
symptoms: Yelp suggestions row title did not include '[query] · Yelp'
The 'Sponsored' label was missing or incorrectly placed
Presence of a 'Feedback' label on the result menu button
URL not shown on hover/selection for Yelp suggestions
reproduction_steps: Trigger the address bar suggestions by typing a query that would show Yelp suggestions
Observe the Yelp suggestion row UI elements such as title, labels, icons, and hover behavior
bug_analysis.technical_details: The patch involved updating the row UI for Yelp suggestions according to a Figma design spec, including changing the title format, adding 'Sponsored' text, removing the 'Feedback' label, and deferring icon size changes to a later change set (Nova). Initial patch caused build/check failures and was backed out and re-pushed after fixes. Multiple commits were pushed to standardize the row UI. Crash reports linked are likely unrelated.
bug_analysis.user_impact: Improved clarity and consistency of Yelp suggestions in the address bar UI, enhancing user experience by displaying correct labels and formatting as per design.

common_patterns: Crashes occur during UI-related operations (e.g., opening tabs, updating suggestions row)
Crashes involve system libraries such as libc.so, libart.so, libbase.so
Crashes are associated with resource exhaustion or memory issues (e.g., OOM)
Crashes happen at startup or during user interaction leading to hanging
potential_root_causes: Out of Memory (OOM) conditions causing instability
Resource management issues in UI components
Faulty interaction between Firefox UI code and underlying system libraries
relevant_fix_clues: Bug descriptions mention OOM as a probable cause
Crashes happen during UI rendering or tab management
No explicit fixes mentioned as statuses are None, indicating unresolved bugs
similar_bugs_context.summary: These similar bugs suggest that crashes linked to Bug 2010185 and other related issues likely stem from memory and resource management problems during UI operations. The involvement of system libraries and crash timing during startup or tab interaction points towards instability caused by either OOM or improper handling of UI resources. Since none of the related bugs are marked resolved, further investigation into memory usage and UI resource management is recommended to identify and fix the root cause.

similar_bugs_data.summary: opening 'inactive tabs' hangs and crashes probably due to OOM
startup Crash in [@ libc.so | libart.so | libbase.so]

common_patterns: Crashes occur during UI-related operations (e.g., opening tabs, updating suggestions row)

The involvement of system libraries and crash timing during startup or tab interaction points towards instability caused by either OOM or improper handling of UI resources. Since none of the related bugs are marked resolved, further investigation into memory usage and UI resource management is recommended to identify and fix the root cause.

refined_analysis.root_cause: Yelp suggestion rows in the address bar UI (in UrlbarView.sys.mjs and UrlbarResult.sys.mjs) do not conform to updated Figma designs: suggestion titles lack the '[query] · Yelp' suffix, 'Sponsored' labels are missing or misplaced, the 'Feedback' label appears incorrectly on menu buttons, icon size changes are applied prematurely before the Nova update, and URLs are not displayed on hover.
symptoms: 'Feedback' label incorrectly present on result menu buttons
Icon sizes changed before Nova update
URLs not displayed on hover over Yelp suggestions
reproduction_steps: Type a query in the address bar that triggers Yelp suggestions
Verify suggestion rows for correct title suffix, 'Sponsored' label placement, absence of 'Feedback' label on menu buttons, deferred icon size changes, and URL display on hover per Figma specs
refined_analysis.technical_details: Update rendering logic in browser/components/urlbar/UrlbarView.sys.mjs and UrlbarResult.sys.mjs by: 1) appending '[query] · Yelp' to suggestion titles, 2) correctly adding or repositioning 'Sponsored' labels, 3) removing the 'Feedback' label from menu buttons, 4) deferring icon size adjustments until the Nova update, and 5) implementing hover handlers to show URLs.
refined_analysis.user_impact: Improves user clarity and visual consistency by aligning Yelp suggestions in the address bar with the latest design specifications.
refined_analysis.proposed_fix_approach: Refactor Yelp suggestion row rendering functions in UrlbarView.sys.mjs and UrlbarResult.sys.mjs to implement the UI updates listed above. Validate changes against Figma designs and ensure no regressions occur.
refined_analysis.optimized_context: Yelp suggestion rows in the address bar UI (browser/components/urlbar/UrlbarView.sys.mjs and UrlbarResult.sys.mjs) lack updated UI features: titles need a '[query] · Yelp' suffix, 'Sponsored' labels must be correctly placed, 'Feedback' labels removed from menu buttons, icon size changes deferred until the Nova update, and URLs displayed on hover. Fixing these aligns the UI with Figma specs and improves user clarity.
refined_analysis.refinement_critique: The analysis identifies the root cause and symptoms well but is overly verbose and includes tangential details, especially about the Nova update without clear linkage. It lacks explicit identification of exact functions or code locations within the files, which are crucial for AI-guided fixes. The implementation guidance is implicit and should be a more concise, stepwise solution sketch. The reproduction steps and technical details are present but can be more succinct and directly tied to code modifications. The optimized context remains somewhat verbose and does not sufficiently emphasize specific files and UI elements for targeted fixes.

filtered_context.concise_summary: Update Yelp suggestion rows in browser/components/urlbar/UrlbarView.sys.mjs and UrlbarResult.sys.mjs to match Figma designs by: appending '[query] · Yelp' to titles, correctly positioning 'Sponsored' labels, removing 'Feedback' labels from menu buttons, deferring icon size changes until the Nova update, and showing URLs on hover.
core_symptoms: 'Feedback' label incorrectly shown on menu buttons
technical_constraints: Implement UI changes only in the specified files
Defer icon size adjustments until the Nova update is released
Ensure hover handlers display URLs correctly
Align all changes strictly with the latest Figma designs
